entry.title: Period Sex at a Wayne Gala
entry.summary:
Author: velvet_alchemist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,132Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 45

Summary: I’m sorry the name is lowkey questionable but I wanted to make sure yall know what this is. entry.title: Stray Knights and Cracked Armor
entry.summary:
Author: daizedndconfused

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,082Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Gotham had been going to shit for a while. Desperate not to get caught in the cross-fire, you take a shortcut after work and end up in front of a rather wounded Arkham Knight. Staring straight into the barrel of his gun. He is beaten and bruised, and couldn't fire the gun if he tried. The Knight has been helping the Scarecrow in his latest scheme to bring Gotham to it's knees, but it seems to have gone wrong. You find him after a brutal encounter with the Bat and for some reason, some silly, stupid reason, you take him back to your apartment like a stray dog off the street. And yet, there may be more to this criminal than meets the eye. The same can certainly be said about yourself.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The City of Black and White Turned Red
entry.summary:
Author: blessingsblessing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,454Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 8

Summary: This is a story that follows a military brat turned detective in one of the most dangerous, disfunctional cities in the world. One day she is met with a new case, a drug bust gone wrong. There's more than meets the eye. A dangerous anti-hero? New high tech drugs? Drug wars? Her normal crazy was going to get a lot crazier as she finds herself right in the middle of the most dangerous, world changing case in the city.

entry.title: Muscle Memory
entry.summary:
Author: r_u_lost_bby_g0rl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,695Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: For the past three years, you’d constantly wondered why you hadn’t died too. Your parent's death hit you hard and getting kidnapped by a Gotham City goon hit harder. After Red Hood saves you, your life takes an unexpected turn full of research, cleaning up wounds, chemistry, and trying to talk with unadjusted millionaires. As the two of you fall in love, Scarecrow's plan to achieve complete control over the citizens of Gotham looms over the fate of your relationship. Uncertainty becomes a constant in your life, and, apparently, so do the ears of the nosy Wayne family.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Claw Hammer Curiosity
entry.summary:
Author: Rosie_Riviter

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,018Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 32

Summary: "Does she always carry around a claw hammer when she's by herself?""Yeah she does, thought it was more effective than pepper spray or a taser."_________________ "Consider my interest piqued. Never knew a gal to carry a claw hammer for self-defense"_________________   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~WORK IN PROGRESS ---- WILL REWRITENot meant to depicte healthy romanceIf any of the unhealthy behavior in this fic is something that you do, or a loved one does, please talk to a professionalThis was meant to be a oneshot, but thenthe creative juices started flowing.

entry.title: There’s got to be someone normal…
entry.summary:
Author: Alryxxz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,314Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: You cant understand it. The whole concept of Gotham as a whole, and its protector—Batman. Sure you respect the guy for not killing off every petty little criminal, but there is no shot that EVERYBODY deserves to live. There has got to be a vigilante who thinks this moral code is idiotic, and that Batman is being a fool while enforcing it, right? Or You bond with a random person over how ridiculous Batman’s ‘no kill’ rule is without knowing he’s actually the red hood.

entry.title: Have you found it yet?
entry.summary:
Author: lixsznshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,304Chapters: 3/27Kudos: 20

Summary: There were many reasons to be sad in Gotham. First of all, because you have the misfortune of living in Gotham. In close second, the endless threat of whatever supercriminal that had decided today was the day the world ends. Third, it stinks. There were many reasons to hate your life if you lived in Gotham. You could breathe the wrong way and get stabbed, or god forbid you decide to carry some cash on you - you’d practically be walking into your own grave at that point. It seems you’ve failed at everything that you’ve tried in your life, including finding a reason to explain your never-ending sadness.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Pinkhair_angel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,094Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 7

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

entry.summary:
Author: haunted_me

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,029Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 8

Summary: What happens when you find something you’re not supposed to? What happens when saving the cities young savior changes your life forever? How do you fix what’s broken? entry.title: Burning House
entry.summary:
Author: Yes_I_have_daddy_issues

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,192Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 76

Summary: We were kids together, growing up in the same crime ridden alleyways and neighborhoods, just two doors down the road from each other. “I’ll find a way.” he turned back to face me, a big smile stretching across his face, one I would never forget, the light in his eyes visible. I never saw Jason again after that night. Not in person at least. On the news, getting adopted by Bruce Wayne of all people, waving and smiling to the cameras, it never reached his eyes the way his smile always did when we were younger. Then he vanished for good.
